statement: It is a vaccination certificate that organizers of events should be able to make a request for upon entry.
It is the European Union (EU) that the Netherlands should make its exit from.
It is decorative fireworks that it should be given permission to set off again during the upcoming New Year's Eve.
It is an additional tax on making a purchase of meat that there should be.
It is the ban on face-covering clothing that the government should effect the abolition of.
It is where new residential areas are built that the national government, rather than provinces and municipalities, should make a decision.
It is the VAT on cultural activities that the government should make reduction in to 5 percent.
It is a new nuclear power plant that the Netherlands should effect the construction of.
It is the historical slave trade that the Dutch government should make an apology for.
It is earnings as much as secondary school teachers that primary school teachers should have.
It is an additional flight tax for short-distance flights that the Netherlands should effect the introduction of.
It is integration that asylum seekers with a temporary residence permit should effect the completion of before getting a rental home.
It is both the purchase and sale of soft drugs by coffee shops that should be given legal authorization.
It is an increase in welfare benefits that an increase in minimum wages should no longer automatically give rise to.
It is at least 40 percent green space that new residential areas should have a proportion of.
It is more refugees than it currently does that the Netherlands should effect the acceptance of.
It is organized crime that limiting rights and freedoms is necessary to take up the fight against.
It is workers that it should be easier for companies to effect the dismissal of.
It is measures that the state should take to effect the redistribution of wealth from the rich to the poor.
It is spending on public health care that the government must effect an increase in, even if this means increasing taxes.
It is the working day that should be given a reduction without reducing workers' wages.
It is the economy that governments should make as few interventions in as possible.
It is the Green Transition that taxes on fossil fuels must be raised to effect the financing of.
It is irrigated agricultural areas that the future Spanish government should effect an increase in by means of large water transfers.
It is more sovereignty that we must effect the recovery of to better defend Spain's interests in Europe.
It is the strengthening of NATO in Europe that the Spanish government should give a boost to.
It is for its citizens to be able to cast a vote on their future in a referendum that the best way to solve the conflict in Catalonia is.
It is the State that negotiating with pro-independence supporters effects a weakening of.
It is the right to self-determination that must be given recognition by the Constitution.
It is Spanish that the policies of linguistic immersion in the native language of bilingual Autonomous Communities have a detrimental effect on.
It is the Law of Democratic Memory passed during this legislature that it is necessary to effect the repeal of.
It is immigrants' own health services that immigrants should make payments for.
It is on all highways that a general speed limit is to take effect.
It is German defense spending that Germany is to effect an increase in.
It is Bundestag elections that young people over the age of 16 are to be granted permission to vote in.
It is the ability of landlords to increase housing rents that is to be given stricter restrictions by law.
It is the statutory pension scheme that all employed persons are to be given requirement for being insured in.
It is the traditional family of father, mother and children that is to be given a stronger boost than other living arrangements.
It is donations from companies to political parties that should continue to be given permission.
It is the Nord Stream 2 Baltic Sea pipeline, which transports gas from Russia to Germany that is to be given permission to go into operation as planned.
It is headscarves that female civil servants are to be given permission to wear while on duty.
It is more financial support for projects to combat anti-Semitism that the federal government is to make provision for.
It is contracts for the expansion of the communications infrastructure in Germany that Chinese companies should not be given permission to receive.
It is church tax that the state should continue to effect the collection of for religious communities.
It is the controlled sale of cannabis that is to be given general approval.
It is the European Union that Germany is to make its exit from.
It is video surveillance in public places that facial recognition software should be given permission to be used for.
It is organic agriculture that should be given a stronger boost than conventional agriculture.
It is Islamic associations that are to be given recognition by the state as religious communities.
It is the statutory minimum wage that is to be given an increase to at least 12 euros by 2022 at the latest.
It is air traffic that is to be given heavier taxation.
It is for themselves that companies are to make decision whether to allow their employees to work from home.
It is the effects of inflation on citizens that social transfers should be given an increase to reduce.
It is private visits to specialists that the state should give funding for if the waiting time at a public facility exceeds three months.
It is a free nursery place that the state should make provision for for every child.
It is the content covered in the curriculum that schools should have more freedom to make a choice of.
It is low-rent apartments that the state should effect the construction of for rent.
It is top earners that taxes should be given an increase for.
It is the same health premium that all entrepreneurs should make payment of regardless of income.
It is the migrant relocation solutions adopted by the European Union that Poland should effect the adoption of.
It is the share of defense spending in Poland's GDP that should be given a further increase.
It is the powers of local governments that should be given an increase at the expense of the central government.
It is public media funding from the state budget that should be given restrictions.
It is the powers of the secret services to track the activities of citizens on the Internet that should be given restrictions.
It is Hungary's sovereignty that the EU's rule of law mechanism makes threats against.
It is Hungarian economic interests that Hungarian foreign policy should be given guidance solely by.
It is by referendum that Hungary should make a decision whether to remain part of the EU.
It is 18 that the age of compulsory schooling should be given an increase back to.
It is at least the OECD average of 5.2 per cent (GDP) that education spending should be given an increase to.
It is teachers' salaries that should be given a twofold increase.
It is political influence that has been given a reduction by changing the university model (reorganisation into a trust).
It is only men and women that should be given permission to marry.
It is targeted measures that the state should take to give a boost to equal participation of fathers and mothers in child-rearing.
It is the Istanbul Convention which combats violence against women and domestic violence that the Hungarian government should give ratification to.
It is favourable gas supply contracts with Russia that one effective way to make reductions in rents is to conclude.
It is inflation that a price freeze on some basic foodstuffs (e.g. chicken tail, milk) is the right step to take up the fight against inflation.
It is the current three-month unemployment benefit that should be given an extension.
It is a family tax credit that is a better way to give support to families than increasing the family allowance.
It is in Hungary that the use of medical cannabis should be given legal authorization.
It is polluting companies that should be given heavier taxation.
It is car traffic that should be given restrictions through various measures (P+R parking, construction of cycle paths, improvement of public transport) in larger cities.
It is a broad social dialogue that the redevelopment of urban green spaces (e.g. the Liget project in Budapest) has a need for.
It is European economic integration that has gone too far: it is member states that should effect the regaining of more autonomy.
It is freedom of choice in end-of-life matters (euthanasia) that citizens should be given a guarantee of.
It is recreational use of marijuana/cannabis that should be given permission.
It is companies that a law is needed to effect the prevention of companies' relocating their production abroad.
It is employees that businesses should be able to effect the dismissal of more easily.
It is the Italian economy that the introduction of a single income tax rate ("flat tax") would have benefits for.
It is beach concessions to private individuals that should be given time limits.
It is the use of nuclear power plants for the purpose of producing energy that should be given a boost.
It is more incinerators/thermal power plants that Italy should effect the construction of.
It is more energy resources that drilling is necessary to make discoveries of.
It is sending arms and war material that Italy should effect the cessation of to the Ukrainian government.
It is more funding that the federal government should make an allocation of for health insurance premium subsidies.
It is pensions that are to be given a reduction (lowering the minimum conversion rate from 6.8% to 6%) as part of the reform of the BVG (occupational pension plan).
It is today's 14 weeks of maternity leave and two weeks of paternity leave that paid parental leave should be given an increase beyond.
It is health care costs that insured persons should make a greater contribution to (e.g., increase the minimum deductible).
It is the Federal Council's ability to restrict private and economic life in the event of a pandemic that should be given stricter restrictions.
It is the hospital offering (national hospital planning with regard to locations and range of services) that the federal government should be given the authority to make a determination on.
It is the requirements for the high school that the federal government should effect the raising of.
It is more qualified workers from non-EU/EFTA countries that should be given permission to work in Switzerland (increase third-country quota).
It is cannabis use that should be given legal authorization.
It is direct active euthanasia that doctors should be given permission to administer.
It is married couples that be given separate taxation (individual taxation).
It is the differences between cantons with high and low financial capacity that should be given a further reduction through fiscal equalization.
It is their electricity supplier that private households should be free to make a choice of (complete liberalization of the electricity market).
It is the registration of new passenger cars with internal combustion engines that Switzerland should have a ban on starting in 2035.
It is the construction of new nuclear power plants that should be given permission again.
It is a comprehensive public service offering also in rural regions that the state should give a guarantee of.
It is a popular initiative aims to make reductions in television and radio fees (CHF 200 per household, exemption for businesses) that there should be.
It is 16 that the voting age should be given a reduction to.
It is at least 120,000 that the army's target number of soldiers should have an expansion to.
It is their cooperation with NATO that the Swiss Armed Forces should have an expansion of.

It is other states that the Federal Council should be allowed to give authorization to re-export Swiss weapons in cases of a war of aggression in violation of international law (e.g., the attack on Ukraine).
It is the Schengen agreement with the EU that Switzerland should effect the termination of and it is more security checks that Switzerland should effect the reintroduction of directly at the border.
It is social and environmental standards that companies should be obliged to give assurances that their subsidiaries and suppliers operating abroad comply with.
It is the Bilateral Agreements with the EU that Switzerland should effect the termination of and it is a free trade agreement without the free movement of persons that Switzerland should seek.
It is a strict interpretation of neutrality that Switzerland should make a return to (renounce economic sanctions to a large extent).
